boundary.title: Structured Data Feature Family Current Boundary

features.title: Google structured data Search Gallery coverage
features.description: Track every Google Search Gallery structured data target as an in-bounds MdWrk structured-data capability. Tags: structured-data, google-search-gallery, schema-org, scope:in-bounds, priority:primary, package:@mdwrk/structured-data.

features.title: JSON-LD AI discovery entity graph
features.description: Emit stable @id values and cross-linked entities for answer engines, AI crawlers, apps, packages, docs, articles, releases, organization, and website records. Tags: structured-data, aieo, entity-graph, scope:in-bounds, priority:primary, package:@mdwrk/structured-data.

features.title: JSON-LD Article
features.description: Generate Article or TechArticle JSON-LD for public articles, docs, and support content. Tags: structured-data, article, content, scope:in-bounds, priority:primary, package:@mdwrk/structured-data.

features.title: JSON-LD Book actions
features.description: Track Book and book action structured data support as an in-bounds structured-data target. Tags: structured-data, book-actions, media, scope:in-bounds, priority:tracked, package:@mdwrk/structured-data.

features.title: JSON-LD BreadcrumbList
features.description: Generate BreadcrumbList JSON-LD for routable public content and application documentation surfaces. Tags: structured-data, breadcrumb, navigation, scope:in-bounds, priority:primary, package:@mdwrk/structured-data.

features.title: JSON-LD Carousel
features.description: Support Carousel structured data for eligible ordered item experiences. Tags: structured-data, carousel, item-list, scope:in-bounds, priority:tracked, package:@mdwrk/structured-data.

features.title: JSON-LD Course list
features.description: Support Course and CourseInstance list structured data for learning paths, tutorials, and education content. Tags: structured-data, course-list, education, scope:in-bounds, priority:secondary, package:@mdwrk/structured-data.

features.title: JSON-LD Dataset
features.description: Generate Dataset JSON-LD for downloadable/generated datasets, registries, conformance matrices, and benchmark artifacts. Tags: structured-data, dataset, artifacts, scope:in-bounds, priority:secondary, package:@mdwrk/structured-data.

features.title: JSON-LD Discussion forum
features.description: Support DiscussionForumPosting structured data for community or discussion surfaces. Tags: structured-data, discussion-forum, community, scope:in-bounds, priority:secondary, package:@mdwrk/structured-data.

features.title: JSON-LD Education Q&A
features.description: Support education Q&A structured data for instructional question and answer content. Tags: structured-data, education-qa, education, scope:in-bounds, priority:secondary, package:@mdwrk/structured-data.

features.title: JSON-LD Employer aggregate rating
features.description: Track EmployerAggregateRating structured data support as an in-bounds target requiring real eligible content. Tags: structured-data, employer-rating, ratings, scope:in-bounds, priority:tracked, package:@mdwrk/structured-data.

features.title: JSON-LD Estimated salary
features.description: Track EstimatedSalary structured data support as an in-bounds target for eligible job and career content. Tags: structured-data, estimated-salary, jobs, scope:in-bounds, priority:tracked, package:@mdwrk/structured-data.

features.title: JSON-LD Event
features.description: Support Event structured data for launches, webinars, releases, and scheduled public activities. Tags: structured-data, event, calendar, scope:in-bounds, priority:secondary, package:@mdwrk/structured-data.

features.title: JSON-LD Fact check
features.description: Track ClaimReview fact check structured data support as an in-bounds target requiring eligible fact-checking content. Tags: structured-data, fact-check, claimreview, scope:in-bounds, priority:tracked, package:@mdwrk/structured-data.

features.title: JSON-LD FAQPage Question Answer
features.description: Generate FAQPage, Question, and Answer JSON-LD for visible FAQ content while tracking Google eligibility limits honestly. Tags: structured-data, faqpage, question, answer, scope:in-bounds, priority:secondary, package:@mdwrk/structured-data.

features.title: JSON-LD Image metadata
features.description: Generate image metadata structured data for screenshots, visual documentation, and media assets. Tags: structured-data, image-metadata, media, scope:in-bounds, priority:secondary, package:@mdwrk/structured-data.

features.title: JSON-LD Job posting
features.description: Track JobPosting structured data support as an in-bounds target for eligible career pages. Tags: structured-data, job-posting, jobs, scope:in-bounds, priority:tracked, package:@mdwrk/structured-data.

features.title: JSON-LD Local business
features.description: Track LocalBusiness structured data support as an in-bounds target for eligible business-location pages. Tags: structured-data, local-business, organization, scope:in-bounds, priority:tracked, package:@mdwrk/structured-data.

features.title: JSON-LD Math solver

features.title: JSON-LD Merchant listing

features.title: JSON-LD Merchant return policy

features.title: JSON-LD Merchant shipping policy
features.description: Track OfferShippingDetails and merchant shipping policy structured data support as an in-bounds commerce target. Tags: structured-data, shipping-policy, commerce, scope:in-bounds, priority:tracked, package:@mdwrk/structured-data.

features.title: JSON-LD Movie
features.description: Track Movie structured data support as an in-bounds target for eligible media content. Tags: structured-data, movie, media, scope:in-bounds, priority:tracked, package:@mdwrk/structured-data.

features.title: JSON-LD Organization

features.title: JSON-LD Practice problem

features.title: JSON-LD Product

features.title: JSON-LD Product snippet
features.description: Support product snippet structured data fields for eligible product pages without synthetic ratings or claims. Tags: structured-data, product-snippet, commerce, scope:in-bounds, priority:secondary, package:@mdwrk/structured-data.

features.title: JSON-LD Product variant
features.description: Track ProductGroup and product variant structured data support for eligible product families. Tags: structured-data, product-variant, commerce, scope:in-bounds, priority:tracked, package:@mdwrk/structured-data.

features.title: JSON-LD ProfilePage
features.description: Generate ProfilePage JSON-LD for author, maintainer, organization, contributor, and profile surfaces. Tags: structured-data, profile-page, identity, scope:in-bounds, priority:secondary, package:@mdwrk/structured-data.

features.title: JSON-LD QAPage
features.description: Generate QAPage JSON-LD for true user-question and answer pages when the content model supports them. Tags: structured-data, qapage, question, answer, scope:in-bounds, priority:secondary, package:@mdwrk/structured-data.

features.title: JSON-LD Recipe
features.description: Track Recipe structured data support as an in-bounds target for eligible recipe content. Tags: structured-data, recipe, content, scope:in-bounds, priority:tracked, package:@mdwrk/structured-data.

features.title: JSON-LD Review snippet
features.description: Support Review and aggregate rating structured data only when real visible review content exists. Tags: structured-data, review-snippet, reviews, scope:in-bounds, priority:secondary, package:@mdwrk/structured-data.

features.title: JSON-LD rich results validation
features.description: Validate syntax, required fields, and Google rich-result eligibility constraints for generated structured data. Tags: structured-data, validation, google-rich-results, scope:in-bounds, priority:primary, package:@mdwrk/structured-data.

features.title: JSON-LD SoftwareApplication
features.description: Generate SoftwareApplication JSON-LD for MdWrk software packages, apps, and software-facing public pages. Tags: structured-data, software-application, software, scope:in-bounds, priority:primary, package:@mdwrk/structured-data.

features.title: JSON-LD Speakable
features.description: Track Speakable structured data support as an in-bounds target for eligible voice assistant content. Tags: structured-data, speakable, voice, scope:in-bounds, priority:tracked, package:@mdwrk/structured-data.

features.title: JSON-LD stable entity IDs
features.description: Validate canonical mdwrk.com-derived JSON-LD @id values and durable fragment conventions for page and site graph entities.

features.title: JSON-LD subscription and paywalled content
features.description: Support subscription and paywalled content structured data when pages intentionally gate content. Tags: structured-data, paywall, subscription, scope:in-bounds, priority:secondary, package:@mdwrk/structured-data.

features.title: JSON-LD supported type gate
features.description: Block unsupported Schema.org types, pending terms, and meta terms unless they are explicitly governed by MdWrk structured-data SPECs.

features.title: JSON-LD Vacation rental
features.description: Track VacationRental structured data support as an in-bounds target for eligible travel content. Tags: structured-data, vacation-rental, travel, scope:in-bounds, priority:tracked, package:@mdwrk/structured-data.

features.title: JSON-LD Vehicle listing

features.title: JSON-LD Video

features.title: JSON-LD visible content parity
features.description: Validate that JSON-LD claims match visible page content and do not create hidden or misleading structured data. Tags: structured-data, parity, policy, scope:in-bounds, priority:primary, package:@mdwrk/structured-data.

features.title: AI and search structured data JSON-LD
features.description: Emit accurate JSON-LD for public lander pages where structured data helps crawlers understand page identity, relationships, and article or documentation content.
